_description: FIXED LOD expression: computes a value at a fixed granularity, independent of view dimensions. Place the calculated column in the datasource columns section.

column_in_datasource._description: Define the FIXED LOD calculated field in the datasource > columns section

column_instance_in_view._description: Reference the LOD field in datasource-dependencies as a column-instance

lod_variants.FIXED: { FIXED [Dim1], [Dim2] : AGG([Measure]) } — ignores view dims, computes at specified dims
lod_variants.INCLUDE: { INCLUDE [Dim] : AGG([Measure]) } — adds extra dim to view granularity
lod_variants.EXCLUDE: { EXCLUDE [Dim] : AGG([Measure]) } — removes a dim from view granularity

notes.naming_convention: [Calculation_LOD_Fixed] — use descriptive names with timestamp suffix in production
notes.derivation: LOD fields typically use Sum derivation in column-instance; the formula itself specifies the aggregation
notes.context_filters: Context filters (context='true') ARE respected by FIXED LOD; regular filters are not
notes.FIXED_vs_INCLUDE_EXCLUDE: FIXED ignores all view dimensions; INCLUDE/EXCLUDE modify view grain relatively
